title: trasus strigosus
side_effects: Trasus strigosus can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and stomach ulcers. In rare cases, excessive use of Trasus strigosus may cause neurological problems, such as dizziness, headaches, and in severe instances, seizures. Additionally, the plant may interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and diabetes.
